metadata.file_name: Bruce Springsteen - Dancing In the Dark.flac
metadata.title: Dancing In the Dark
metadata.lyrics:
[00:12.97] I get up in the evening
[00:16.77] And I ain't got nothing to say
[00:19.71] I come home in the morning
[00:22.74] I go to bed feeling the same way
[00:26.32] I ain't nothing but tired
[00:29.27] Man, I'm just tired and bored with myself
[00:33.01] Hey there, baby
[00:35.75] I could use just a little help
[00:38.78] You can't start a fire
[00:41.93] You can't start a fire without a spark
[00:45.49] This gun's for hire
[00:48.66] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[00:53.17] 
[00:58.17] Messages keep getting clearer
[01:01.42] Radio's on and I'm moving 'round my place
[01:04.78] I check my look in the mirror
[01:07.98] I wanna change my clothes, my hair, my face
[01:11.39] Man, I ain't getting nowhere
[01:14.31] I'm just living in a dump like this
[01:17.70] There's something happening somewhere
[01:21.03] Baby, I just know that there is
[01:24.09] You can't start a fire
[01:27.27] You can't start a fire without a spark
[01:30.72] This gun's for hire
[01:33.74] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[01:38.29] 
[01:49.55] You sit around getting older
[01:53.20] There's a joke here somewhere and it's on me
[01:56.31] I'll shake this world off my shoulders
[01:59.54] Come on, baby, the laugh's on me
[02:02.81] Stay on the streets of this town
[02:05.94] And they'll be carving you up, all right
[02:09.43] They say you gotta stay hungry
[02:12.37] Hey baby, I'm just about starving tonight
[02:15.61] I'm dying for some action
[02:18.73] I'm sick of sitting around here, trying to write this book
[02:22.33] I need a love reaction
[02:25.24] Come on, baby, give me just one look
[02:28.52] You can't start a fire
[02:31.84] Sitting around crying over a broken heart
[02:35.28] This gun's for hire
[02:38.20] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[02:41.59] You can't start a fire
[02:44.79] Worrying about your little world falling apart
[02:48.15] This gun's for hire
[02:51.14] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[02:55.65] 
[02:57.70] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[03:04.15] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[03:08.38] 
[03:10.51] Even if we're just dancing in the dark
[03:14.46] 
[03:20.59] Hey, baby!
[03:23.70]
